calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jun-01-2015 Off Calendar

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Apr-14-2015 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-16-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-16-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Sandi Petritsch, CSR #11684.

Michele K. Trausch, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Matthias Moran, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by plaintiff Clare Moran.
No appearance by defendant Charles David Ramser, Jr.
Plaintiffs settled with defendant Thuy My Pham on or about June 5, 2008.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on December 14, 2007.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, June 16, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiffs Matthias Moran and Clare Moran, and against Charles David Ramser, Jr. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $126,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $13,221.16.
Attorney's Fees - $14,753.50.
Costs - $1,632.00, for a total of $155,606.66, minus $2,000.00 received from defendant Thuy My Pham, for a adjusted total of $153,606.66.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2008 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2008 Continued To Jun-02-08 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 611

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Deft Charles David Ramser, Jr. And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-27-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiffs MATTHIAS MORAN AND CLARE MORAN'S motion to compel the attendance of defendant at deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to contact counsel for plaintiff to schedule his deposition. The deposition shall be completed within 10 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $768 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Ntc Of Motion And Memo Of P An A To Compel The Deposition; Declaration
Off Calendar May-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Trent Latta, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Mattias Moran

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Mattias Moran and Clare Moran's motion to compel attendance at deposition is ordered off calendar as it was not timely noticed. CCP Section 1005, requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing, with five calendar days added if the motion was served by mail. The motion was filed and served by mail on April 18, 2008. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2008 Off Calendar
